5.【我新的决定 Be 4+5+6】5. My new decision: Be 4+5+6

options.name: 5.1. 有任何疑虑，顾虑，第一时间与第一人处理Clear every doubt immediately with the first person
5.2. 用理想宣告团队，目标 > 行动 > 结果来验证团队Declare the team with visions: Validate with goals > Actions > Results
5.3.  团队赢，个人赢Team wins I win
5.4. 承诺加行动引发支持Commitment + Action Initiate support
5.5. 授权等于信任支持，接受授权等于为结果负责Authorisation signifies trust and support. Being authorised is to hold resposibilities towards the results
6.1. 以我的理想与目标/承诺去主宰我的心态及行为，而不是以感觉/评估及量度Dominate my Belief and Actions with my Vision, Goals and Promises NOT with my Feelings, Judgement or Assessments
6.2. 百分百时间，百分百可能性 Create all possibilities within Time
6.3. 若要如何，全凭自己If it is to be it is up to me
6.4. 领袖活出感召力True Leaders Inspire
6.5. 言行一致，言出必行！Walk the talk
6.6. 团队合作，每一成员承诺于共同的理想及目标Team collaboration: every member committed towards the same visions and goals

fields.name: 4.【反省】对照生活事情一模一样  【Self-reflection】Comparing it to real-life situations is exactly the same.
